mapper.select: select p.participant_id as participantId, p.user_id as userId, p.claimed_user_id as claimedUserId, p.name as name, p.guardian_mobile as guardianMobile from jst_participant p where p.participant_id = #{participantId} and p.del_flag = '0' limit 1

select p.participant_id as participantId, p.user_id as userId, p.claimed_user_id as claimedUserId, p.name as name, p.guardian_mobile as guardianMobile from jst_participant p where p.del_flag = '0' and (p.user_id = #{userId} or p.claimed_user_id = #{userId}) order by case when p.user_id = #{userId} then 0 else 1 end, p.participant_id asc limit 1

select t.team_appointment_id as teamAppointmentId, t.team_no as teamNo, t.team_name as teamName, t.contest_id as contestId, c.contest_name as contestName, t.appointment_date as appointmentDate, t.session_code as sessionCode, t.total_persons as totalPersons, t.member_persons as memberPersons, t.writeoff_persons as writeoffPersons, t.status as status from jst_team_appointment t left join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = t.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0' where t.team_appointment_id = #{teamAppointmentId} and t.channel_id = #{channelId} and t.del_flag = '0' limit 1

select ar.appointment_id as appointmentId, m.participant_id as participantId, m.user_id as userId, m.member_no as memberNo, m.name_snapshot as memberName, m.mobile_snapshot as mobileSnapshot, m.sub_order_id as subOrderId, m.writeoff_status as writeoffStatus, ar.main_status as appointmentStatus, (select count(1) from jst_appointment_writeoff_item wi where wi.appointment_id = ar.appointment_id and wi.del_flag = '0' and wi.status = 'used') as usedItems, (select count(1) from jst_appointment_writeoff_item wi where wi.appointment_id = ar.appointment_id and wi.del_flag = '0') as totalItems from jst_team_appointment_member m left join jst_appointment_record ar on ar.team_appointment_id = m.team_appointment_id and ar.participant_id = m.participant_id and ar.del_flag = '0' where m.team_appointment_id = #{teamAppointmentId} and m.del_flag = '0' order by m.member_id asc
select * from jst_team_appointment where team_appointment_id = #{teamAppointmentId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
